sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_triples (sub VARCHAR, pred VARCHAR, obj VARCHAR);

CREATE PROCEDURE test_http_ttl AS BEGIN DECLARE ses any; http_ttl_triple(vector (dict_new(1000), 0, '', '', '', 0, 0, 0, 0), '<http://example.org/subject2>', '<http://example.org/predicate2>', '<http://example.org/object2>', ses); END;
UPDATE rdf_triples SET obj = '<http://example.org/updated_object1>' WHERE sub = '<http://example.org/subject1>' AND pred = '<http://example.org/predicate1>';
